check.if: external hunt is planned AND INTERACTIVE
check.ask: The external-precedent hunt needs web research. Ask the user to approve dispatching web-search-researcher, recommended option first. If declined, drop the external hunt and note it as a deferred source in the register.

check.if: external hunt is planned AND AUTONOMOUS
check.action:
If web_search_approved is true, keep the external hunt. If false or absent, emit to stdout and stop:
CLARIFICATION_NEEDED: External-precedent hunt requires web research, but web_search_approved was not set. Re-dispatch with web_search_approved=true, or limit the hunt to internal sources.

substep.title: Dispatch the Hunts
substep.action: Dispatch the internal-code and external hunts in one parallel wave via the Task tool in a SINGLE message. The prior-decision hunt is two-stage: thoughts-locator in this wave; thoughts-analyzer in a second wave against the artifacts the locator surfaces. Compose each prompt per child-subagent-dispatch prompt-anatomy — the hunt question alone, never the parent task's intent.

substep.title: Validate Returns and Sharpen-Redispatch
substep.action: Redispatch any vague return with a sharper prompt before assessment. A "no matches" return is the most important kind of negative finding here — it is direct evidence of no precedent in that source. Keep it; it shapes the register in step 3. Collect raw candidate precedents per source.
